key_insight: TO-Master uses an LLM agent to automate the full topology-optimization workflow—from interpreting user intent to building FEM models, checking setup, and launching optimization.
engineering_relevance: It lowers the barrier to practical topology optimization by reducing manual preprocessing and solver setup for structural and thermal design tasks.
method: Natural-language agent orchestrates FEM and optimization tools.
Supports mesh/geometry/image inputs, mesh checking, and typed solver arguments.
Handles 2D/3D compliance, thermal conduction, multi-load, and stress-constrained TO.
evidence_signal: The abstract reports numerical experiments on standard benchmarks and more complex engineering examples, plus an instruction ablation study showing the importance of tool rules, reasoning guidance, and few-shot examples.
watch_item: Performance depends on correct tool orchestration and robust interpretation of ambiguous instructions, so failure cases may still require expert oversight.
paper_title: TO-Master: an LLM-agent framework for automated topology optimization
